findings.evidence: Lines 12-14: “identify the genus-field generators ... as the prime discriminants”; lines 126-128: “prime discriminants `-4`, `-3`, and `-7`, the genus-field generators”; theorem statement lines 131-135 adjoins `{Complex.I, sqrtNegThree, sqrtNegSeven}`.
findings.fix: Reword both docstrings to say the genus field is `ℚ(√-1, √-3, √-7)` attached to the prime discriminants `-4`, `-3`, and `-7`, without calling the discriminants themselves generators.
findings.issue: The module docstring says the genus-field generators for `ℚ(√-21)` are the prime discriminants `-4`, `-3`, and `-7`, and the theorem docstring repeats this at lines 126-128; the generators in the formal field are `Complex.I`, `sqrtNegThree`, and `sqrtNegSeven`, attached to radicands `-1`, `-3`, and `-7`.

summary: The new file documents its exports, but two docstrings conflate prime discriminants with the actual field generators/radicands.
